effect.kubejs.coughing.description: Don't try this at home. Or anywhere, really.
effect.kubejs.satiation.description: Slowly restores the food bar over time.
item.minecraft.splash_potion.effect.mad_: Splash Potion of the Mad Prospector
item.minecraft.lingering_potion.effect.m: Lingering Potion of the Mad Prospector
info.kubejs.copper_brush.insufficient_du: Not enough durability, only waxing %s blocks...
info.kubejs.copper_brush.fail_too_big: Can't wax an area that big!
rf.ench.respiration_1: Increases underwater air time on helmets
rf.ench.respiration_2: and increases backtanks' maximum air capacity.
rf.ench.knight_jump_2: an extra jump mid-air per level.
rf.ench.knight_jump_3: Leggings may take durability damage from extra jumps.
rf.ench.riptide_1: Launches wielder in the direction they're
rf.ench.riptide_2: facing when thrown while in contact with water.
rf.ench.vengeance_1: Stores a portion of damage taken
rf.ench.vengeance_2: and applies it to wearer's attacks.
rf.ench.vitality_1: Increases maximum health of the wearer
rf.ench.vitality_3: Increases durability damage taken by the armor.
rf.ench.unbreaking_1: Grants a chance to negate durability damage.
rf.ench.smite_1: Inflicts extra damage against undead mobs.
rf.ench.homing_1: Allows projectiles to home in on targets.
rf.ench.soul_speed_1: Increases movement speed on soul-infused blocks.
rf.ench.total_recall_1: Pet will be sealed in a soul box
rf.ench.total_recall_2: when on low health, preventing its death
rf.ench.bracewalk_2: Allows wearer to walk through Cobwebs,
rf.ench.shockwave_1: Creates a shockwave around the wearer
rf.ench.spread_of_ailments_1: Applies wielder's status effects to projectiles.
rf.ench.displacement_1: Causes attackers to randomly teleport around.
rf.ench.tethered_teleport_1: Following pets will teleport with their owner
rf.ench.tethered_teleport_2: through portals and when using Exopearls.
rf.ench.impaling_1: Inflicts extra damage against aquatic mobs
rf.ench.impaling_2: or any mobs in contact with water.
rf.ench.reach_1: Allows the wearer to reach further.
rf.ench.muffled_1: Pet will make no sounds and
rf.ench.soulbound_1: Prevents the item from being lost after death.
rf.jei.wooden_tools: Wooden tools are the first main tool tier. They possess no special ability, but gotta start somewhere, right? Wooden Pickaxes can harvest Coal, Copper and all Nether ores.
rf.jei.copper_tools: Copper tools are the second main tool tier after Wood. They will visually oxidise as their durability dwindles, though this is purely aesthetic. Copper Pickaxes can harvest any ore Wooden ones can, plus Iron, Zinc and Lead.
rf.jei.iron_tools: Iron tools are the third main tool tier after Copper. They possess no special ability, but are reliably durable and effective. Iron Pickaxes can harvest any ore Copper ones can, plus Gold, Cinnabar, Diamond and Silver.
rf.jei.diamond_tools: Diamond tools are the fourth main tool tier after Iron. They possess no special ability, but are even more durable and effective than iron. Diamond Pickaxes can harvest any ore, including Ancient Debris.
rf.jei.golden_tools: Golden tools are somewhat fragile, but harvest blocks quickly and increase drops from blocks like ores, and from mobs. Golden Pickaxes can harvest any ore Iron ones can.
rf.jei.rose_gold_tools: Rose Gold tools are quick, with a delicate touch - most blocks harvested with them will drop exactly as they are. They also deal magic damage to targets, piercing through armor. Rose Gold Pickaxes can harvest any ore Iron ones can.
rf.jei.steel_tools: Steel tools are a bit slow and heavy, but are highly durable and will knock targets further away. Steel Pickaxes can harvest any ore Iron ones can.
rf.jei.electrum_tools: Electrum tools harvest blocks the quickest out of all tiers and will deal more damage while sprinting. Electrum Pickaxes can harvest any ore.
rf.jei.necromium_tools: Necromium tools will cause struck targets to move slower. Necromium Pickaxes can harvest any ore.
rf.jei.netherite_tools: Netherite tools are extremely durable and won't burn up when thrown into fire or lava. They will set targets on fire, and automatically smelt mined blocks. Netherite Pickaxes can harvest any ore.
rf.jei.leather_armor: Leather armor will reduce fall damage. Leather Boots allow the wearer to walk on Powder Snow.
rf.jei.copper_armor: Copper armor will grant immunity to lightning damage. When struck by lightning while wearing Copper armor, the wearer will gain the Aftershock effect. More pieces of Copper armor equipped will increase the level of Aftershock gained.
rf.jei.chainmail_armor: Chainmail armor will deal damage back to attackers.
rf.jei.iron_armor: Iron armor will provide slight knockback resistance.
rf.jei.diamond_armor: Diamond armor will resist projectile damage.
rf.jei.golden_armor: Golden armor is somewhat fragile, but will lightly resist fire damage.
rf.jei.rose_gold_armor: Rose Gold armor will resist magic damage.
rf.jei.steel_armor: Steel armor will provide good knockback resistance.
rf.jei.griefer_armor: Griefer armor will highly resist explosions.
rf.jei.sanguine_armor: Sanguine armor will heal the wearer with every strike.
rf.jei.electrum_armor: Electrum armor will increase movement speed.
rf.jei.netherite_armor: Netherite armor will provide good knockback resistance along with good protection against fire damage, and won't burn up when thrown into fire or lava.
rf.jei.rose_gold_rapier: Strikes very quickly. Will heal half a heart of health with every strike. Upgrading to this item will not keep the original item's enchantments.
rf.jei.steel_mace: Will deal increased damage depending on how many blocks the wielder has fallen before striking a target. Will launch the wielder upwards after the falling strike. Upgrading to this item will not keep the original item's enchantments.
rf.jei.electrum_spear: Allows the wielder to dash in the direction they're moving by right-clicking. Can be charged by holding right-click while sneaking to strike from further away. Upgrading to this item will not keep the original item's enchantments.
rf.jei.necromium_claymore: Can be charged by holding right-click to unleash a big swipe attack. Striking by left-clicking will inflict the Staggered effect on targets. Causes mobs to drop their heads frequently. Upgrading to this item will not keep the original item's enchantments.
rf.jei.netherite_broad_axe: Performs sweep attacks that deal full damage to every target struck. Wielder gains the Rampaging effect when killing mobs and gains the Retaliation effect when taking damage. Upgrading to this item will not keep the original item's enchantments.
rf.jei.hoes: Hoes can obtain seeds from foliage such as Grass. They can also rake through Leaves quicker than other tools.
rf.jei.shears: Shears can gather Wool from Sheep, as they won't yield any when killed. Yes, that Crab Claw does function as a pair of Shears.
rf.jei.crab_claw: Will drop from Coconut Crabs when they're killed using a Knife.
rf.jei.catching_net: Can be used to catch Fireflies, Caterpillars, Butterflies, and any kind of Fish.
rf.jei.turtle_helmet: Will have its durability continously drain while underwater, but as long as it has any durability, it will provide oxygen.
rf.jei.arrow: Standard ranged ammunition. Can be tipped with any Lingering Potion or crafted into other arrow variants.
rf.jei.radiant_arrow: Inflicts the Glowing effect on targets.
rf.jei.rose_gold_arrow: Will not inflict any damage on targets. Flies faster than other arrows and knocks targets far away.
rf.jei.steel_arrow: Inflicts more damage but flies slower than other arrows.
rf.jei.torch_arrow: Lights targets on fire. Places a Torch when it lands on a block.
rf.jei.rope_arrow: Will not inflict any damage on targets. Deploys a line of Rope below it when it lands on a block. Can be crafted with Ropes to replenish its supply.
rf.jei.bananarrow: Inflicts the Slipping effect on targets. Places a Banana Peel when it lands on a block. Causes target to get attacked by nearby Chimpanzees.
rf.jei.mischief_arrow: Summons a single Creepie on targets.
rf.jei.lachryte_arrow: Will not inflict any damage on targets. Allows the user to swap places with targets.
rf.jei.bomb: Can be thrown to deal explosive damage in an area. Does not damage terrain. Activates Dynamite, Creepers or other similar blocks and mobs.
rf.jei.blue_bomb: Can be thrown to stick to surfaces for a brief moment before exploding and dealing very high damage, lighting targets on fire and weakening them if not dead. Does not damage terrain. Activates Dynamite, Creepers or other similar blocks and mobs. Found rarely in underground Urns and as part of various loot.
rf.jei.spiky_bomb: Can be thrown to deal explosive damage in an area. Throws out shrapnel in all directions which poisons targets. Does not damage terrain. Activates Dynamite, Creepers or other similar blocks and mobs.
rf.jei.rose_gold_bomb: Can be thrown to cause no damage but high knockback. Does not damage terrain. Does not activate Dynamite, Creepers or other similar blocks and mobs.
rf.jei.tea: Tea is rarely found in Swamps. Harvesting Tea in different stages of its growth will yield different colored leaves.
rf.jei.coffee: Coffee is found in Basalt Deltas and occassionally as part of loot in Nether Fortresses and Bastion Remnants. In the Overworld, Coffee needs crops around it to grow and will cause those crops to wither away. It will grow by itself if planted in the Nether.
rf.jei.wheat: Wheat is grown with Wheat Seeds, which can be found by mowing through Grass using a Hoe.
rf.jei.pumpkin: Pumpkins can be found in most grassy biomes, typically in grouped patches. A Knife is required to cut them up into slices. They can also be carved with Shears or Knives.
rf.jei.melons: Watermelons can be found in Jungles, Rainforests and similar biomes. A Knife is required to cut them up into slices.
rf.jei.sweet_berries: Sweet Berries are most commonly found growing in Taigas. Foxes love them.
rf.jei.glow_berries: Glow Berries are found underground in Lush Caves.
rf.jei.foul_berries: Foul Berries can be found growing in Maple Forests. Turkeys love them, for some reason.
rf.jei.strawberries: Strawberries are found in patches around Plains biomes. Growing Strawberry Bushes at altitudes higher than 256 will yield Pineberries.
rf.jei.mint: Mint is typically found in any kind of Taiga or most of the windswept biomes, excluding the Windswept Savanna.
rf.jei.bananas: Bananas are found in Jungles and Tropical Beaches, hanging off of thick stalks with Banana Fronds on them.
rf.jei.vanilla: Vanilla is found in Savanna biomes. Vanilla Pods will release a cloud of poison if harvested without Shears.
rf.jei.flax: Flax can be found in the wild in all biomes.
rf.jei.eggplants: Eggplants are found somewhat sparsely in Jungles.
rf.jei.corn: Corn can be found scattered around in all Plains biomes.
rf.jei.avocados: Avocados can be found growing on Avocado Trees in Jungles.
rf.jei.lemons: Lemons can be found growing on Lemon Trees in Savannas.
rf.jei.truffles: After feeding a Pig a Golden Carrot, it will sniff its way to some Buried Truffles, which can be dug up to obtain Truffles.
rf.jei.cattails: Cattails can be found in the wild in all biomes.
rf.jei.coal: Coal can be found commonly on high altitudes.
rf.jei.iron: Iron can be found near Deepslate level or at high altitudes.
rf.jei.copper: Copper can be found very commonly both over and underground, though it's less common in lower altitudes.
rf.jei.gold: Gold is most commonly found near the top of the Deepslate layer, but it can be found extra frequently near the surface in Badlands biomes. It's also found in the Nether.
rf.jei.cinnabar: Cinnabar is found near the lower half of the world and can be seen more frequently in lower altitudes.
rf.jei.redstone: Redstone Dust can be obtained by crushing Cinnabar.
rf.jei.diamonds: Diamonds are most common near the very bottom of the world.
rf.jei.ancient_debris: Ancient Debris is found in small chunks near the bottom of the Nether. Ancient Scraps will drop from Piglin Brutes, and occasionally from Wildfires. Chunks of Ancient Debris can occasionally be found in Magnetite Geodes.
rf.jei.zinc: Zinc is found scattered around at pretty much any altitude underground.
rf.jei.lead: Lead is found somewhat frequently around Deepslate level, but it can be found extra frequently near the surface in Savanna biomes. It's also found in the Nether.
rf.jei.silver: Silver is found very rarely right between the Stone and Deepslate layers underground, but it can be found extra frequently in Electrum Forests. Finding Silver can be made easier by carrying a Silver Mirror.
rf.jei.magnetite: Magnetite can be found near large Iron veins deep underground. Deepslate Iron Ore will occasionally drop Magnetite Nuggets, and small Magnetite Geodes covered with Obsidian will generate around the Nether. These Geodes will sometimes contain a few chunks of Ancient Debris. Finding Magnetite and Ancient Debris can be made easier by carrying a Magnetic Compass.
rf.jei.quartz: Quartz is found very commonly all around the Nether.
rf.jei.salt: Rock Salt can be found in mountainous biomes, Dripstone Caves and Blossom biomes. It can be crushed into Salt, which is used as a cooking ingredient and will prevent undead mobs from walking over it when placed in a line. Placing Dripstone below Pointed Dripstone with Rock Salt and water above it will eventually turn the Dripstone into Rock Salt.
rf.jei.blast_proof_ores: All ores are immune to explosions, meaning they can be blown up with TNT and not get destroyed.
rf.jei.campfires: Campfire Kindling can be lit by sneaking and right-clicking on one while holding Twigs in both hands, or by using a Fire Striker. Standing in close proximity of a lit campfire will grant the Comfort effect.
rf.jei.beds: A comfy Bed to sleep the night's troubles away. Sets the player's spawn point when right-clicked. Sleeping will not skip the night instantly.
rf.jei.bedrolls: A cheaper, makeshift Bed. Does not set the player's spawn point. Sleeping will not skip the night instantly.
rf.jei.composter: Will allow recycling of various organic materials into Bone Meal, Worms, or even occasionally some Organic Compost.
rf.jei.organic_compost: Made out of organic waste or occasionally obtained from a Composter. Will start to decompose when placed, which can be sped up by sunlight, nearby water, fungi or other blocks of Organic Compost. When finished decomposing, it turns into Rich Soil.
rf.jei.rich_soil: High quality soil that can grow crops without water. Will grow crops at a faster rate if water is provided. Obtained by placing down Organic Compost and letting it decompose.
rf.jei.feasts: Feasts are extra filling dishes that can be placed down and have multiple portions taken out of them, usually with Bowls.
rf.jei.keg: Used to ferment various fun beverages and foods with helpful or unique effects. For some recipes, it must be heated up or cooled down by placing certain types of hot or cold blocks near it, like Magma Blocks, Heating Casks, Campfires, or Snow, Ice, Ice Crates, etc.
rf.jei.echo_chest: Will automatically collect items on the ground in a radius, even through walls. Will not collect items behind vibration occluding blocks like Wool or Cloth.
rf.jei.bellows: Will blow air when stood on or powered by Redstone. Can push entities, fan fires to keep them burning, speed up Copper oxidization and speed up workstations like Furnaces. Using multiple on one block will make the effect stack.
rf.jei.leather_scraps: Leather can be cut into Leather Scraps with Shears on a Cutting Board. Leather Scraps can substitute for whole pieces of Leather in all recipes, making things more efficient with a bit of leatherworking.
rf.jei.hoglin_hide: Some thick hide skinned off of a Hoglin. Need something lighter than a Sword to get one...
rf.jei.polishing: Sandpaper and Grindstones will allow polishing gems like Rough Cinnabar, Diamonds or Quartz. Sandpaper can be used by looking at rough gems on the floor or by holding them in the off-hand and holding right-click, while Grindstones can simply be right-clicked with a rough gem in hand.
rf.jei.item_magnet: When activated with a right-click, an Item Magnet will attract all items nearby towards the holder.
rf.jei.echo_fork: Will temporarily add a glowing outline to mobs around the wielder in a large radius, allowing them to be seen through walls.
rf.jei.trowel: Will select and place a random block from the hotbar with every use. Perfect for adding some variation to builds.
rf.jei.echorang: Will fly far away when thrown, only stopping and flying back after reaching its maximum distance, hitting a block, or a mob. Can destroy the block it hits and bring its drops to the wielder. Will bring entity drops back to the wielder if it deals the killing blow. Will keep flying further if it flies near Sculk Shriekers.
rf.jei.heart_of_the_sea: An ancient type of artifact found rarely in buried treasure chests or as part of Elder Treasure obtained from Elder Guardians. Combined with some Nautilus Shells, it can be used to craft a Conduit.
rf.jei.elder_eye: After being placed down and activated by being right-clicked, will detect living entities within its line of sight and output a Redstone signal.
rf.jei.paragliders: When equipped in the chest slot, will allow for much slower descent and avoiding fall damage when activated by pressing the jump key while mid-air.
rf.jei.onion_cry: Cutting Onions will make nearby players and mobs cry, dealing a small amount of damage. This can be prevented by donning some particular pieces of headwear.
rf.jei.cloth_scraps: Cloth Scraps drop from all mobs wearing clothes, like Zombies, Piglins and Witches, and can also be found in various loot chests.
rf.jei.brush: Will allow brushing various animals for some drops, such as Feathers from Chickens, or String from Sheep. After being brushed, animals can't be brushed again until some time has passed. Brushes can also be made into Glue Brushes or Wax Brushes.
rf.jei.wax_brush: Allows for bulk waxing blocks, creating an area to wax when right-clicked, which can be confirmed by right-clicking again or discarded by right-clicking while sneaking.
rf.jei.sap: Sap can be gathered from Sappy Maple logs using Bottles. Some Maple Logs will turn into Sappy Maple Logs when stripped. Sap is used to make Syrup.
rf.jei.latex: Latex can be gathered from Latex Jungle or Rosewood Logs using Bottles. Some Jungle or Rosewood logs will turn into Latex Jungle or Rosewood Logs when stripped. Latex is used to make Rubber and Balloons.
rf.jei.rubber: Rubber is used in making various movement-related components, and blocks made of Rubber are bouncy not only for players and mobs, but for projectiles as well. In certain recipes, Rubber can be substituted with Dried Kelp as a cheaper but less efficient alternative.
rf.jei.cutting_board_sheets: Copper and Gold Ingots can be pressed into Sheets using a Hammer on a Cutting Board, though this has a small chance to fail and not return a Sheet, making this method good for when in a pinch. Otherwise, a Mechanical Press is more efficient.
rf.jei.creeper_spores: Drops from Creepers. Used in various recipes, or can be thrown to create a small spore cloud that spawns friendly Creepies.
rf.jei.glow_goop: Drops from Fireflies and can also be obtained by crushing Glow Berries. Up to three Glow Goop can be placed in one spot, which will provide an invisible light source. Holding Glow Goop in hand will make all nearby Glow Goop visible.
rf.jei.yak_bear_fur: Brown Bears and Yaks can be sheared for their fur or hair, though beware, as this will make them hostile towards the one who sheared them.
rf.jei.compass: Points towards the world's spawn point. If used on a Lodestone, points towards the specific Lodestone to which it was assigned. Right-clicking with it in hand will briefly display the holder's latitude and longitude.
rf.jei.recovery_compass: Points towards the holder's last death point and will not be lost upon death.
rf.jei.magnetic_compass: Always points towards north, unless there's interference being caused by nearby Magnetite, in which case it will glow and point towards the Magnetite. Right-clicking with it in hand will briefly display the holder's latitude and longitude. If there's interference, it will display the coordinates of the interference's source instead.
rf.jei.clock: Shows the time of day. Right-clicking with it in hand will briefly display the time of day in numerical form and the day number.
rf.jei.barometer: Shows the weather. Right-clicking with it in hand will briefly display the current weather conditions.
rf.jei.spyglass: Allows zooming the camera in any direction. Displays block or entity information at the top of the screen while zooming. Using the scroll wheel will adjust the zoom distance. With a keybind (Z by default), can be instantly used from anywhere in the inventory.
rf.jei.depth_gauge: Shows how deep the holder is in the world. Right-clicking with it in hand will briefly display the holder's altitude.
rf.jei.atlas: Allows for automatic mapping. Putting it and some Empty Maps together in a Crafting Table or Cartography Table will put the Empty Maps inside, ready to be used. When in the hotbar, it'll display a minimap in the corner (upper right by default) of the screen.
rf.jei.silver_mirror: Will glow when Silver Ore is nearby, and will create particles that lead to the nearest vein of Silver Ore when hitting undead mobs, dealing high damage to them in the process.
rf.jei.wayward_lantern: Allows pets that have unloaded from the world to teleport to it, so that they won't get lost. Makes for good street lights.
rf.jei.collar_tags: Can be used to rename pets, but can also have unique enchantments applied to it which will grant pets various benefits.
rf.jei.deed_of_ownership: Can be used on a pet to bind it and passed over to other players, at which point they can right-click the pet with the deed to transfer its ownership to them.
rf.jei.command_drum: Can command all pets in a large radius to stay, follow or wander. Can receive Redstone signals, which will command the pets of the player who placed it.
rf.jei.flute: Plays music. Can be assigned to pets by right-clicking on them. When used while assigned to a pet, will call the assigned pet to the user's location.
rf.jei.awoken_exopearl: When used, will fly in the direction of Shipwrecks, Ruined Nether Portals and Bastion Remnants. Has a chance to shatter after being used.
rf.jei.spirited_exopearl: When used, will fly in the direction of Dungeons, Mineshafts, Nether Fortresses and Ancient Cities. Has a chance to shatter after being used.
rf.jei.binding_exopearl: Comes in pairs and will allow locating and keeping track of another player when one of the two is given to them and right-clicked. May require being calibrated by placing two Binding Exopearls together in the crafting grid.
rf.jei.soul_bead: Can be acquired by killing Vexes or Wraiths, by destroying Spawners, or by bartering with Piglin Alchemists.
rf.jei.echo_shard: Can be obtained by harvesting Sculk Sensors, or found in Ancient City chests.
rf.jei.lachryte: Lachryte Tears can be obtained from Crying Obsidian or by crushing Exopearls. A few of them are almost always found in Ruined Nether Portal chests and Bags of Sorcery taken from Witches. Ghasts and Lachmites will also drop Lachryte Tears.
rf.jei.lachryte_extraction: Right-clicking Crying Obsidian while holding any type of Pickaxe will extract a Lachryte Tear, leaving behind regular Obsidian.
rf.jei.dimensional_tears_bottle: Can be used on a valid Obsidian portal frame to open a portal to the Nether. Will teleport the player to their last set spawn point when consumed.
rf.jei.dimensional_tears_bucket: Can be emptied into a Cauldron and then jumped into, which will teleport the player to their last set spawn point and use up a third of the liquid.
rf.jei.anvil: Allows repairing equipment using materials. Also allows renaming items and putting together equipment to combine their enchantments.
rf.jei.forge: Used to smelt ores faster, create some mid-game tools and armor, or to create Enchanted Tablets and modify various weapons into more advanced ones. Unfortunately, there isn't another block called a Fabric or NeoForge.
rf.jei.enchanted_tablets: Enchanted Tablets can apply enchantments to equipment using Smithing Tables. All of them are made by infusing a Blank Tablet with ingredients. Hovering over an Enchanted Tablet and holding Shift will show descriptions for its enchantments.
rf.jei.runes: Runes can be applied at an Anvil to change the color of the enchantment glint effect on enchanted items. Applying a Blank Rune to an enchanted item will remove its enchantment glint altogether.
rf.jei.stardust: Powerful ingredient obtained by crushing Nether Stars. Can be used as a universal repair material, meaning it can repair any item with durability. Also required to create Everlasting Tablets.
rf.jei.tackle_box: Tackle Boxes will allow customizing Reinforced Fishing Rods. Hooks, Fishing Lines, Bobbers and any kind of bait can be attached to them, though they do not strictly require any of these to be attached in order to work.
rf.jei.hooks: Hooks can be equipped to Reinforced Fishing Rods in a Tackle Box. Each Hook will have a unique effect on the fishing experience.
rf.jei.magnetite_hook: Will increase the chances of catching treasure, but also the chances of catching junk.
rf.jei.copper_hook: Will allow casting the fishing line further.
rf.jei.steel_hook: Will allow casting the fishing line closer.
rf.jei.double_hook: Won't cast any closer or further, but will instead allow catching two pieces of fishing loot at once, on occasion.
rf.jei.zinc_hook: Will widen the window of opportunity to reel in a catch.
rf.jei.worms: Worms can be used as fishing bait when attached to Reinforced Fishing Rods in a Tackle Box. They'll slightly decrease the amount of time it takes to catch something. Worms can be obtained by feeding Corn Kernels to a Chicken, Duck or Turkey, which will make them search for Wormy Dirt. Worms will also occasionally pop out of Composters.
rf.jei.spider_eye: Spider Eyes can be used as fishing bait when attached to Reinforced Fishing Rods in a Tackle Box. They'll slightly decrease the amount of time it takes to catch something.
rf.jei.firefly: Fireflies can be used as fishing bait when attached to Reinforced Fishing Rods in a Tackle Box. They'll decently decrease the amount of time it takes to catch something. Fireflies can be caught using a Catching Net.
rf.jei.caterpillar: Caterpillars can be used as fishing bait when attached to Reinforced Fishing Rods in a Tackle Box. They'll significantly decrease the amount of time it takes to catch something. Caterpillars can be obtained by breeding Butterflies with flowers, then catching the resulting Caterpillar with a Catching Net.
rf.jei.golden_worm: Golden Worms can be used as fishing bait when attached to Reinforced Fishing Rods in a Tackle Box. They'll significantly decrease the amount of time it takes to catch something. They can be crafted, rarely drop from Wormy Dirt or be found in Cans of Bait.
rf.jei.dwarf_geode: Drops from Deposits found underground. Can also be found in loot chests or underground Urns, and occasionally drops from Deepers.
rf.jei.deepslate_dwarf_geode: Drops from Deepslate Deposits found underground. Can also be found in loot chests or underground Urns, and occasionally drops from Peepers.
rf.jei.blackstone_dwarf_geode: Drops from Blackstone Deposits found in the Nether. Can also be found in loot chests, and occasionally drops from Magma Cubes.
rf.jei.loot_bags: Can be opened by right-clicking while held. What could be inside?
rf.jei.totem_of_undying: One of four ancient relics. When held in either hand, upon receiving fatal damage, will prevent the wielder's death and grant them various buffs. Rarely found in Ancient Cities.
rf.jei.wand_of_freezing: One of four ancient relics. Summons damaging and freezing ice blocks above foes. Rarely found in Skeleton Fortresses.
rf.jei.mask_of_dishonesty: One of four ancient relics. When worn and sneaking, will make the wearer go fully invisible to mobs and players, even when wearing other armor or holding an item. Rarely found in Desert or Badlands Pyramids.
rf.jei.conch_of_conjuring: One of four ancient relics. Summons vicious fangs that come out of the ground and deal damage in a straight line in front of the wielder. Rarely found in Jungle Pyramids.
rf.jei.stone_and_deepslate: Lava flowing on or next to water will create Stone. In deeper parts of the world, this same interaction will create Deepslate instead.
rf.jei.blackstone: Lava flowing next to Blue Ice over Netherrack will create Blackstone.
rf.jei.basalt: Lava flowing next to Blue Ice over Soul Soil will create Basalt.
rf.jei.granite: Lava flowing next to water over Red Sand will create Granite.
rf.jei.diorite: Lava flowing next to water over Calcite will create Diorite.
rf.jei.schist: Lava flowing next to water over Gravel will create Schist.
rf.jei.dripstone: Lava flowing next to water over Packed Mud will create Dripstone.
rf.jei.calcite: Lava flowing next to water over a Heap of Bones will create Calcite.
rf.jei.tuff: Lava flowing next to water over Deepgrit will create Tuff.
rf.jei.crimsite: Lava flowing next to liquid Scarlet Cheese will create Crimsite.
rf.jei.ochrum: Lava flowing next to liquid Honey will create Ochrum.
rf.jei.asurine: Lava flowing next to water over Lapis Lazuli will create Asurine.
rf.jei.veridium: Lava flowing next to water over a Block of Copper Patina will create Veridium.
rf.jei.limestone: Lava flowing next to batter will create Limestone.
rf.jei.scoria: Lava flowing next to liquid Chocolate will create Scoria.
rf.jei.glance: Lava flowing next to molten Lead will create Glance.
rf.jei.exolite: Lava flowing next to Blue Ice over a Block of Exopearl will create Exolite.
rf.jei.magma: Lava flowing next to Blue Ice will create Magma Blocks.
rf.jei.etching: Using an Etching Table and a Music Label, custom music can be etched onto Blank Music Discs. Inserting a Blank Music Disc, a Music Label and a URL that leads to a SoundCloud track, Bandcamp track, or an MP3, OGG or WAV file will allow etching the music onto the disc. (SoundCloud links can be unreliable)
rf.jei.album_cover: Acts like a Bundle for Music Discs, holding nine of them in one slot.
rf.jei.radio: Can play music from a URL that leads to a SoundCloud track, Bandcamp track, or an MP3, OGG or WAV file. (SoundCloud links can be unreliable)
rf.jei.boombox: Can have a Music Disc or Album inserted by right-clicking inside of the inventory and play on the go.
rf.jei.creeper_discs: Dropped by a Creeper when killed by a Skeleton.
rf.jei.dungeon_discs: These discs can also be found in dungeon chests.
rf.jei.scour_disc: Found in dungeon chests and Jungle Pyramids.
rf.jei.ward_disc: Can also be found in Zombie Catacombs, Skeleton Fortresses or Nether Dungeons.
rf.jei.mellohi_disc: Can also be found in Zombie Catacombs or Skeleton Fortresses.
rf.jei.far_strad_discs: These can also be found in Shipwrecks or buried treasure chests.
rf.jei.blocks_mall_discs: These can also be found in Abandoned Mineshafts.
rf.jei.stal_11_discs: Can also be found in Ancient Cities.
rf.jei.otherside_disc: Can be forged, or found in Ancient Cities
rf.jei.pigstep_disc: Found in Piglin Bastion Remnants. Emanates a strange energy near Nether Portals...
rf.jei.structure_disc: Can be forged, or found in Nether Dungeons.
rf.jei.fox_disc: Can be forged, and Foxes can rarely be found holding this disc in their mouths.
rf.jei.coconut_disc: Found in buried treasure chests and Loot Bags.
rf.jei.slabrave_disc: Can be obtained by feeding any of the discs that drop from Creepers to a Slabfish.
rf.jei.hullabaloo_disc: Can be obtained by getting a Chimpanzee to kill a Rhino by shooting it with a Bananarrow.
rf.jei.death_disc: Dropped by a Chicken, Duck or Turkey when killed by a Rhino.
rf.jei.droopy1_disc: Can be forged, and has a small chance to be dropped by mobs that can drop their heads.
rf.jei.raveyard_disc: Dropped by a Withered when killed by a Skeleton.
rf.jei.exostep: Found in the §korectudrp sEdxou ortfses, §ror obtained by throwing a §kpsPteig cisd &rthrough a §kehetNr ltorpa.
rf.jei.precipice_disc: Found in Desert and Jungle pyramid loot, or inside loot bags.
rf.jei.creator_disc: Found in Abandoned Mineshaft loot, or inside loot bags.
rf.jei.atlantis_disc: Can be forged, or sometimes found in Elder Treasure obtained from Elder Guardians or Elder Thrashers.
rf.tooltip.deprecated_2: This item is unobtainable, and will
rf.tooltip.deprecated_3: be removed. However, it can be placed
rf.tooltip.deprecated_4: into a crafting grid for compensation.
